dialogueChunks.intro: You did it, {player_name}. The wall is crumbling, and I don't mean the stone one.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: When the elders saw what you brought back, the room went quiet. Not angry-quiet: thoughtful-quiet. {target_npc} stood up and spoke about {quest_focus_the}, about how protecting {quest_stakes_the} matters more than old grudges. For the first time in years, people from both sides sat at the same table.
dialogueChunks.outro: You gave us something nobody else could: a reason to try. Take this, and know you're welcome on both sides.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}... the feud isn't over. But something shifted, and it's because of you.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} and their friend from the other side met openly for the first time yesterday. The families haven't reconciled, not by a long stretch, but they didn't stop the meeting either. A few of the younger ones even joined in. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} still a sore subject, but at least people are talking about it instead of throwing punches.
dialogueChunks.outro: Change is slow when the roots go deep. But you planted a seed that nobody can uproot now.

dialogueChunks.intro: I won't sugarcoat it, {player_name}. The truce is fragile. But it exists, and that's more than we had before.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Some of the hardliners refused to accept the evidence. They stormed out and took supporters with them. But {target_npc} stayed, and so did the majority. The barrier is still standing, but a gate has been built into it: a real, physical gate that both sides agreed to.
dialogueChunks.outro: You didn't solve a generations-old feud in a few days. Nobody could. But you cracked it open, and that took more courage than most people have.
